mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.title, p.content, p.type, p.question_id, p.status, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.favorite_count, p.view_count, p.reject_reason, p.anonymous, p.images, p.videos, p.create_time, p.update_time
case when p.anonymous = 1 then null else u.nickname end as nickname, case when p.anonymous = 1 then null else u.avatar end as avatar

choose.when: (select count(*) from forum_like fl where fl.post_id = p.id and fl.user_id = #{userId}) as liked, (select count(*) from forum_favorite ff where ff.post_id = p.id and ff.user_id = #{userId}) as favorited,

mapper.sql: from forum_post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id left join question q on p.question_id = q.id
mapper.select:
select , ,
q.content as question_content
order by p.create_time desc

select , ,
q.content as question_content
where p.id = #{postId} and p.deleted = 0
mapper.update: update forum_post set view_count = view_count + 1 where id = #{postId}
